conversation.content:
Extract values for these columns. Document has 0 pages.

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Race - N (%) | White | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants of White race included in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 2: Race - N (%) | White | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of control arm participants who identified as White in terms of their racial background? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 3: Race - N (%) | Black or African American | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants identifying as Black or African American in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 4: Race - N (%) | Black or African American | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of participants identified as Black or African American in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 5: Race - N (%) | Asian | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial who are of Asian race? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 6: Race - N (%) | Asian | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the trial who identify as Asian? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 7: Race - N (%) | Nat. Hawaiian or Pac. Islander | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants identifying as Native Hawaiian or Pacific Islander in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 8: Race - N (%) | Nat. Hawaiian or Pac. Islander | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients in the control arm of the trial who identify as Native Hawaiian or Pacific Islander by race? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 9: Race - N (%) | Amer. Indian or Alaska Nat. | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial who identify as American Indian or Alaska Native by race? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 10: Race - N (%) | Amer. Indian or Alaska Nat. | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the trial who identified as American Indian or Alaska Native by race? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 11: Race - N (%) | Other | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial who identified as "other" in terms of race? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 12: Race - N (%) | Other | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of participants with 'Other' race included in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 13: Race - N (%) | Unknown | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants with unknown race included in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 14: Race - N (%) | Unknown | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the trial with unknown race? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.

For informational columns (trial name, arms, etc.), use get_chunks_by_page([1, 2]) first. For specific columns, use search_chunks. Submit when you have enough information.
